_comment: Accounts the brain executes on. The AI analyzes the MASTER (first, active) account + market once and emits decisions; every account here mirrors them programmatically, sized by its own risk_pct and gated by min_grade. To add an account: append a block (datadir must be a fresh dir for ledger isolation). min_grade: A=only highest-conviction, B=also medium. live=true requires real keys + arms LOOP_TRADER_ALLOW_LIVE.
